content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 7, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 7, 2026, focused heavily on the Eliza Cloud Apps (Product 2) infrastructure, implementing per-tenant isolated container hosting and associated data-plane provisioning. Significant progress was made in cloud API stability, authentication fixes for staging environments, and resolving critical bugs in agent provisioning and billing services.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Eliza Cloud Apps (Product 2) Infrastructure**
*   Implemented per-tenant isolated container hosting, including database isolation, per-app URLs, and metered billing ([#8293](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8293)).
*   Added an encryption-free path for tenant cluster admin DSNs to facilitate provisioning without master keys ([#8299](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8299)).
*   Deployed Terraform modules for the apps data-plane to manage staging and production environments ([#8297](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8297), [#8296](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8296)).
*   Introduced a DB ambassador to ensure isolated app containers can securely reach their respective tenant databases ([#8304](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8304)).

**Cloud API and SDK Enhancements**
*   Added container lifecycle verbs (PATCH/DELETE/scale) to the cloud API ([#8270](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8270)).
*   Expanded `ElizaCloudClient` with `transcribeAudio()` for voice/STT support ([#8266](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8266)).

**Cloud Stability and Bug Fixes**
*   Resolved multiple authentication and routing issues, including SSE auth via query tokens ([#8309](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8309)), WebSocket auth for staging ([#8308](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8308)), and missing UI routes ([#8320](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8320)).
*   Fixed billing logic for containers when earnings conversion fails ([#8269](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8269)).
*   Corrected BitRouter pricing lookups and forced OpenRouter as a BYOK upstream ([#8319](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8319), [#8307](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8307), [#8300](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8300)).
*   Fixed provisioning daemon issues related to Steward platform-key paths and agent registration ([#8303](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8303), [#8301](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8301), [#8295](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8295)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#8316](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8316) chore(lifeops): sweep up post-decomposition leftovers.
*   [#8312](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8312) fix(cloud-frontend): VITE_ENVIRONMENT passthrough.
*   [#8302](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8302) Add blackwall-eliza-guardrail to plugin registry.
*   [#8298](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8298) fix(example): drop inert Privy and affiliate key.
*   [#8294](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8294) registry: add @usenami/plugin-signer.
*   [#8292](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8292) fix(cloud): resolve unauthorized error in agent image provisioning.
*   [#8290](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8290) fix(core): bound advanced-memory rolling-summary prompt.
*   [#8289](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8289) feat(cloud-sdk): "Sign in with Eliza Cloud" app-auth SDK.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
**Eliza Cloud Apps Scaling and Ingress**
*   [#8321](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8321) Audit of scaling and ingress gaps for the apps data plane prior to go-live.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   **[#8321](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8321) Eliza Cloud Apps: scaling + ingress gaps:** Discussions confirm that the core application code is launch-ready, with isolation contracts and routing clients verified. Current focus is on the data-plane infrastructure, specifically Caddy ingress installation, pgbouncer connection pooling, and multi-node placement. Contributors are coordinating tasks to avoid duplication while ensuring production readiness before enabling `APPS_DEPLOY_ENABLED`.
